orig_text:
f the bind was successful, the resultCode will be success, therwise it will be 
one of:
correct_text:
If the bind was successful, the resultCode will be success, otherwise it will be 
one of:
notes: The sentence is missing an 'I' for 'If' and an 'o' for 'otherwise'.

orig_text:
The MessageID MUST be that of a an operation which was requested earlier in 
this connection.
correct_text:
The MessageID MUST be that of an operation which was requested earlier in 
this connection.
notes: The sentence has "a an operation" which should be "an operation".

orig_text:
-- may also have zero elements (if types only was requested, or
-- all values were excluded from the result.)
correct_text:
-- may also have zero elements (if typesOnly was requested, or
-- all values were excluded from the result.)
notes: The phrase "types only" appears to refer to the typesOnly field defined in Section 4.5.1. Using the field name directly improves clarity and avoids ambiguity.
